title: lotus minoriflorus
intro: Lotus minoriflorus, also known as the small-flowered lotus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Lotus minoriflorus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lotus minoriflorus often include dried roots, leaves, and flowers, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
